enforceMode.name: Equip-limit enforcement
enforceMode.hint: How to handle RAW-illegal equip attempts (too many hands, a second armour suit, a shield with no free hand).

proficiencyEnforcement.name: Proficiency penalties
proficiencyEnforcement.hint: Whether weapon, armour, and fighting-style proficiency PENALTIES are enforced (Non-Proficient Use, RR p. 106). Positive facts from ACKS Abilities characters — Weapon Finesse, a Specialization's style, Martial/Armour Training picks, Weapon Focus — always apply through the bridge regardless of this setting. Always enforce treats this module's flags as authoritative: configure each character with its ACKS Class Training items (a fighting style plus weapon/armour lists) and the gate is correct. Automatic instead keeps penalties off while ACKS Abilities is active, for worlds where characters rely on it for their base proficiency lists (which its model cannot yet express, so absence of a fact must not read as untrained).
proficiencyEnforcement.auto: Automatic — penalties off while ACKS Abilities is active; bridged bonuses still apply
proficiencyEnforcement.on: Always enforce — this module's flags are authoritative (default; configure characters via the ACKS Class Training compendium)
proficiencyEnforcement.off: Never enforce (equip limits, styles, and bridged bonuses still apply)

rollAutomation.name: Automate attack/damage rolls
rollAutomation.hint: Inject RAW fighting-style and proficiency modifiers into attack and damage rolls (Weapon Finesse, dual-wield, two-handed damage, Weapon Focus, Precise Shooting, non-proficiency). Requires libWrapper. Turn off to apply only always-on bonuses via the loadout effect.

paperdollStrategy.name: Equipment slot source
paperdollStrategy.hint: Where equipped state is read from.
paperdollStrategy.auto: Auto (Paper Doll if installed, else max-per-type)

defaultHandBudget.name: Default hand budget
defaultHandBudget.hint: Number of hands a humanoid actor has for wielding weapons and shields. Raised per-actor by the Four Arms power or monster anatomy effects.

overlayShieldVariants.name: Overlay: shield variants (JJ)
overlayShieldVariants.hint: Buckler, auxiliary, crescent, heater, kite, and phalanx shields with strap positions and vulnerable rules. Judges Journal pp. 407–408.

overlayManeuvers.name: Overlay: combat maneuvers
overlayManeuvers.hint: Special-maneuver helpers (disarm, knock down, wrestle, sunder, etc.) aware of Combat Trickery and weapon qualities. Revised Rulebook pp. 305–306.

overlayItemLoss.name: Overlay: item loss from damage (JJ)
overlayItemLoss.hint: Destroy carried equipment on heavy area damage. Judges Journal p. 398.

overlayMounted.name: Overlay: mounted saves
overlayMounted.hint: Paralysis saves to stay mounted without a military saddle / Mounted Combat or Riding. Revised Rulebook p. 308.

overlayNamed.name: Overlay: named magic items (JJ)
overlayNamed.hint: Named arms and armour that unlock bonuses by level. Judges Journal p. 399.

overlayScavenged.name: Overlay: scavenged equipment (RR)
overlayScavenged.hint: Condition tables for salvaged gear. Revised Rulebook p. 160.

overlayBeastman.name: Overlay: beastman gear (MM)
overlayBeastman.hint: Barbed armour, blasting-fire bombs, dread banners, and other beastman equipment. Monstrous Manual pp. 55–57.

overlayEnclosingHelm.name: Overlay: enclosing helmet
overlayEnclosingHelm.hint: Heavy helmets impose −1 to surprise rolls and −4 to Listening but grant +2 on Mortal Wounds. Revised Rulebook p. 128.

violation.multipleArmor: Only one suit of armour may be worn at a time ({items}).
violation.tooManyShields: A combatant may wield at most two shields ({items}).
violation.shieldNoStyle: This character lacks the Weapon & Shield fighting style, so the shield grants no Armor Class benefit ({items}).
violation.weaponNotProficient: {items}: weapon unusable by this character's class.
violation.armorNotProficient: {items} is heavier than this character's armour proficiency (max: {max}).
violation.nonProficientUse: Non-proficient use of weapons or armor ({items}): attacks as a 0th-level fighter (0th-level characters instead take an additional −1), no attribute bonus to attack throws or Armor Class, class powers unusable, and no XP from adventures while so equipped.
violation.thiefSkillGated: Backstabbing, Hiding, Pickpocketing, and Sneaking are unavailable while wearing {items}.

wear.noContainers: No containers yet — open the Container Manager to flag a pack or sack and start stowing gear.
wear.head: Head

container.title: Containers
container.annotateHint: Stamp RAW capacities onto backpacks, sacks, saddlebags, quivers, and the adventurer's harness already on this character (Revised Rulebook pp. 142–145).
container.noneYet: No containers on this character yet. Use “Annotate carrying gear” to flag packs and sacks this character already carries, or the box control beside an item to make anything a container.
container.emptyHint: empty — drag gear here to stow it
container.empty: Empty the container (contents stay on the character)
container.unmake: Stop treating this as a container
container.wornHint: Worn or wielded — stowing it will unequip it first.
container.correction: RAW corrections applied: {stone} st {direction} (adventurer's harness / bowquiver).
container.noActor: Select a token or assign a character first.
container.foreignItem: Only gear already on this character can be stowed.

storeFailed.selfContained: An item cannot be put inside itself.
storeFailed.notStowable: {item} cannot be stowed in a container.
storeFailed.cycle: {container} is already inside {item} — that would nest them in a loop.

notify.autoUnequipped: Auto-unequipped to keep a legal loadout: {items}.
notify.paperdollConfigured: Paper Doll configured for ACKS equipment slots (hands, armour, helmet).
notify.namedGuessSpent: {name} has already guessed this item's name and may not guess again until gaining a level.
notify.namedAdvanced: {item} reveals more of its power to {name}.
notify.namedRevealed: {item} answers to its true name — its full powers awaken.

ACKS-EQUIPMENT.container.bashConfirm: Break open {name}? The container is destroyed; its contents spill out.
ACKS-EQUIPMENT.container.bashConfirmFrag: Break open {name}? It is fragile — the container AND everything inside it are destroyed.
ACKS-EQUIPMENT.container.unmake: Stop treating this as a container
ACKS-EQUIPMENT.container.annotateAll: Annotate carrying gear from the RAW capacity table
ACKS-EQUIPMENT.container.lockedHint: Locked. You cannot see what is inside.
ACKS-EQUIPMENT.lock.gloved: You cannot pick a lock wearing gloves (RR p. 145).
ACKS-EQUIPMENT.lock.bashedSpilled: {name} is broken open; {n} item(s) spill out.
ACKS-EQUIPMENT.lock.manual.noAbilitiesMo: Roll {ability} yourself — acks-abilities is not active, so this cannot roll it for you.
ACKS-EQUIPMENT.lock.manual.noThrow: {ability} carries no throw on this seat. Connect your book, or roll it yourself.
ACKS-EQUIPMENT.lock.manual.unresolved: Rolled — the target could not be resolved here, so the Judge decides whether {name} opens.
